description_long: This hammer features a unique design, with a head that appears to be constructed from a dark, metallic material and a handle that is elongated and wrapped in a textured, likely rubberized grip. The head is broad and flat, with a circular striking face on each end, and lacks any claw or peen, suggesting a mallet or sledge style. The handle is straight and features a wrist strap at the end, enhancing grip security and portability. The front of the hammer displays a digital device embedded into the head, resembling an old Nokia mobile phone, complete with a screen and keypad, which is an unusual and distinctive feature. The overall color palette is dominated by dark blue, black, and gray tones, with some metallic highlights. The hammer shows signs of moderate wear, with scuffs and scratches visible on both the head and handle.
description: A dark, metallic hammer with a straight, textured handle and a digital device embedded in the head, showing moderate wear and a wrist strap for secure handling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the circular, flat head and the straight, textured handle with a wrist strap.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the embedded digital device (Nokia phone) on the hammer's head and the keypad details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the flat head and handle profile.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the digital device and the handle's grip texture.
attribute_handle_type: Straight handle with a rubberized, textured grip and a wrist strap at the end for secure handling.
attribute_head_type: Broad, flat, double-faced head resembling a mallet or sledge style, with a digital device (Nokia phone) embedded in the front face.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible scuffs and scratches on the head and handle, indicating moderate wear.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Wrist strap attached to the handle.
